---
title: "Growth_Data_Exploration"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
#library(gtools) #testing #unneeded

```

## Data

Each data pathway is different, so upload the data from your computer 

```{r}
#View(ToxGrowth)
```

```{r}
unique(ToxGrowth$Species)
```

```{r}
ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Lampsilis siliquoidea") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

# above species tested twice (two different years)

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Villosa iris") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Hyalella azteca") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Pimephales promelas") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Oncorhynchus mykiss") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 

# above species tested twice (two different years)

ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Chironomus dilutus") %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_point(alpha=.6) 


```

```{r}
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc=as.character(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc=as.numeric(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
class(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc2)
ToxGrowth$Tox_conc1=str_sort(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc, numeric = TRUE) #pissing me off
print(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc)
print(ToxGrowth$Tox_conc1)

Rainbowmussel=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Villosa iris")

Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc3 = factor(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc , levels=c(20, 228, 392, 713, 1462, 3000)) #also pissing me off # i forgot a comma

Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc2=mixedsort(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc) #not doing what i want

Rainbowmussel %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc3, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

boxplot(Rainbowmussel$Dry_rep_wt ~ Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc3)
```
```{r}

Fatmucket15=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Lampsilis siliquoidea") %>%
  filter(Year == "2015")        
unique(Fatmucket15$Tox_conc)
unique(Fatmucket$Year)
Fatmucket15$Tox_conc = factor(Fatmucket15$Tox_conc, levels = c(20, 228, 392, 713, 1462, 3000))

Fatmucket16=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Lampsilis siliquoidea") %>%
  filter(Year == "2016")          
unique(Fatmucket16$Tox_conc)
unique(Fatmucket$Year)
Fatmucket16$Tox_conc = factor(Fatmucket16$Tox_conc, levels = c(1.5, 17.3, 34.3, 75.3, 152.3, 320.1))

Rainbowmussel=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Villosa iris")
unique(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc)
Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc = factor(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc , levels=c(20, 228, 392, 713, 1462, 3000))

Scuds=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Hyalella azteca")
unique(Scuds$Tox_conc)
Scuds$Tox_conc = factor(Scuds$Tox_conc, levels = c(54, 171, 292, 532, 1014, 1990))

Fatheadminnow=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Pimephales promelas")
unique(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc = factor(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc, levels = c(17.5, 224.3, 370.9, 765.7, 1566.9, 3032.4))

Rainbowtrout16=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Oncorhynchus mykiss") %>%
  filter(Year == "2016")
unique(Rainbowtrout16$Tox_conc)
unique(Rainbowtrout$Year)
Rainbowtrout16$Tox_conc = factor(Rainbowtrout16$Tox_conc, levels = c(1.5, 9.8, 20.7, 40.2, 82.0, 166.3))

Rainbowtrout18=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Oncorhynchus mykiss") %>%
  filter(Year == "2018")
unique(Rainbowtrout18$Tox_conc)
unique(Rainbowtrout$Year)
Rainbowtrout18$Tox_conc = factor(Rainbowtrout18$Tox_conc, levels = c(19.0, 210.3, 419.4, 781.0, 1579.9, 3240.4))

Midge=ToxGrowth %>%
  filter(Species == "Chironomus dilutus")
unique(Midge$Tox_conc)
Midge$Tox_conc = factor(Midge$Tox_conc, levels = c(0.2, 5.7, 11, 21.2, 44.7, 96.6))
```

```{r}
Fatmucket15 %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +    #not working and idk why
  geom_boxplot() 

Fatmucket16 %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

Rainbowmussel %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 


Scuds %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

Fatheadminnow %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

Rainbowtrout16 %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

Rainbowtrout18 %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 

Midge %>%
  replace(is.na(.), 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tox_conc, y = Dry_rep_wt), ) +
  geom_boxplot() 


```


```{r}
head(Fatmucket15)

as.numeric(Fatmucket15$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatmucket15)

mean(Fatmucket15$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatmucket15$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatmucket15$Survival)
sd(Fatmucket15$Survival)

fm51 = rnorm(24, mean=969.1667, sd=1039.746)
fm52 = rnorm(24, mean=8.291667, sd=3.793348)
t.test(fm51, fm52, var.equal = T)


head(Fatmucket16)

as.numeric(as.character(Fatmucket16$Tox_conc))
dim(Fatmucket16)

mean(Fatmucket16$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatmucket16$Tox_conc)
                                        #not working
mean(Fatmucket16$Survival)
sd(Fatmucket16$Survival)

#fhm1 = rnorm(48, mean=, sd=)
fhm2 = rnorm(48, mean=9.854167, sd=0.4607849)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)

head(Rainbowmussel)

as.numeric(Rainbowmussel$Tox_conc)
dim(Rainbowmussel)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

rbm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
rbm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(rbm1, rbm2, var.equal = T)


head(Scuds)

#as.numeric(Scuds$Tox_conc)  #root of problem?
dim(Scuds)

#mean(Scuds$Tox_conc)         #i dont even know at this point
#sd(Scuds$Tox_conc)

mean(Scuds$Survival)
sd(Scuds$Survival)

#scd1 = rnorm(30, mean=, sd=)
scd2 = rnorm(30, mean=9.6, sd=0.8550055)
t.test(scd1, scd2, var.equal = T)


head(Fatheadminnow)

as.numeric(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
dim(Fatheadminnow)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Tox_conc)

mean(Fatheadminnow$Survival)
sd(Fatheadminnow$Survival)

fhm1 = rnorm(24, mean=996.2833, sd=1060.732)
fhm2 = rnorm(24, mean=10.70833, sd=5.376917)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


head(Rainbowtrout16)

#as.numeric(Rainbowtrout16$Tox_conc)
dim(Rainbowtrout16)

#mean(Rainbowtrout16$Tox_conc)
#sd(Rainbowtrout16$Tox_conc)

mean(Rainbowtrout16$Survival)
sd(Rainbowtrout16$Survival)

#rt61 = rnorm(24, mean=, sd=)
rt62 = rnorm(24, mean=10, sd=0)
t.test(rt61, rt62, var.equal = T)


head(Rainbowtrout18)

#as.numeric(Rainbowtrout18$Tox_conc)
dim(Rainbowtrout18)

#mean(Rainbowtrout18$Tox_conc)
#sd(Rainbowtrout18$Tox_conc)

mean(Rainbowtrout18$Survival)
sd(Rainbowtrout18$Survival)

#rt81 = rnorm(24, mean=, sd=)
rt82 = rnorm(24, mean=13.29167, sd=1.428869)
t.test(fhm1, fhm2, var.equal = T)


head(Midge)

#as.numeric(Midge$Tox_conc)
dim(Midge)

#mean(Midge$Tox_conc)
#sd(Midge$Tox_conc)

mean(Midge$Survival)
sd(Midge$Survival)

#mdg1 = rnorm(48, mean=, sd=)
mdg2 = rnorm(48, mean=9.208333, sd=1.486941)
t.test(mdg1, mdg2, var.equal = T)

```
